app.unlockHint: This system uses a zero-knowledge architecture. The encryption key is kept in memory only during the active session. A page refresh or prolonged inactivity clears the key from memory. Please re-enter your password to restore the key.
app.indexeddbWarning: ⚠️ This browser does not support local storage (possibly in incognito mode). SafeBox cannot be used.
app.dbErrorDetail: An unexpected database error occurred. Please force-refresh the page to recover (Ctrl+F5).

login.title: Sign In
login.googleDesc: Sign in with Google. Password is used to decrypt your keys.
login.googleNotConfigured: Google Sign-In not configured. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in config/constants.ts.
login.googleTimeout: ⚠️ Google service loading timed out. Check your network.
login.googleSuccess: Google verified. Please enter your password.
login.unlockFailed: Key unlock failed. Please check your password.
login.needRecovery: No mnemonic cached on this device. Use recovery to sign in on a new device.
login.unlockChangedHint: Wrong password, or master password changed on another device. If recently changed, click "Logout" below and recover with mnemonic + new password.

register.title: Sign Up
register.googleDesc: Sign up with Google. You still need a password for encryption.
register.googleNotConfigured: Google Sign-Up not configured. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in config/constants.ts.
register.googleSuccess: Google verified. Please set your password.
register.fillAllFields: Please enter email, verification code and password.
register.fillGoogleAndPassword: Please complete Google verification and set a password.
register.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak; please use a stronger password
register.mnemonicHint: Keep these 12 words safe. Master password and mnemonic together derive the encryption key; you need the mnemonic to recover on a new device. Shown only once.
register.warning: ⚠️ Forgetting master password without mnemonic = permanent data loss (master password derives encryption, cannot reset)

recovery.title: Sign In on New Device
recovery.subtitle: Enter recovery phrase + master password to restore on a new device
recovery.mnemonicPlaceholder: Enter 12 English words separated by spaces
recovery.hint: New device requires recovery phrase + master password to derive the decryption key. Lost master password without recovery phrase = data unrecoverable.
recovery.mnemonicWordCount: Recovery phrase must be 12 English words separated by spaces
recovery.recoverFailed: Recovery failed. Check your recovery phrase or master password.

list.title: Vault
list.emptySubtitle: Tap + to add your first password

edit.name: Name *
edit.typeLoginHint: Website and app login credentials with username and password
edit.typeNoteHint: API keys, SSH keys, recovery codes, and any text
edit.typeFileHint: SSH key files, certificates, and other confidential documents

settings.logoutConfirm: Sign out? Your keys will be cleared from memory.
settings.deleteAccountEnterCode: Enter the verification code sent to your email/phone:
settings.deleteAccountConfirm2: All your data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email.
settings.enterNewPwAndCode: Please enter new password and verification code.
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters.
settings.backupPasswordPrompt: Set a backup password (to encrypt the backup file):
settings.exportDescription: Export all your vault items as an encrypted backup file (.safebox). You will need a password to decrypt this file.
settings.importDescription: Import items from an encrypted backup file (.safebox). This will add items to your current vault.
settings.mnemonicPlaceholder: Required to re-derive the encryption key when changing master password

appLayout.offline: ⚠️ Offline — data will sync automatically when reconnected
appLayout.discardEdit: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

devices.revokeConfirm: Revoke this device? Its session will be terminated immediately.
